description: This Rust source file implements a callback-based signer that interacts with an external process to sign data, including configuration handling, process management, and certificate parsing.

classes.name: ExternalProcessRunner
classes.description: Implements SignCallback to run an external process for signing data.

classes.name: CallbackSignerConfig
classes.description: Holds configuration for external signing, including algorithm, cert path, reserve size, and optional TSA URL.

classes.name: CallbackSigner
classes.description: Implements the Signer trait, using a callback to sign data via an external process.

methods.name: ExternalProcessRunner::new
methods.description: Creates a new ExternalProcessRunner with given config and signer path.

methods.name: ExternalProcessRunner::sign
methods.description: Runs the external signer process, passing data via stdin, and returns the signature bytes.

methods.name: CallbackSignerConfig::new
methods.description: Constructs a new configuration from SignConfig and reserve size.

methods.name: CallbackSigner::new
methods.description: Creates a new CallbackSigner with a callback and configuration.

methods.name: CallbackSigner::sign
methods.description: Signs data using the callback, handling errors and embedding.

methods.name: CallbackSigner::alg
methods.description: Returns the signing algorithm from the config.

methods.name: CallbackSigner::certs
methods.description: Reads and parses the signing certificates from the specified path.

methods.name: CallbackSigner::reserve_size
methods.description: Returns the reserve size from the config.

methods.name: CallbackSigner::time_authority_url
methods.description: Returns the optional TSA URL from the config.
